name: OpenCLI
summary: Use local OpenCLI through NextClaw with guided setup, readiness checks, and safe browser or desktop task workflows.

summaryI18n.en: Use local OpenCLI through NextClaw with guided setup, readiness checks, and safe browser or desktop task workflows.
summaryI18n.zh: 通过 NextClaw 使用本地 OpenCLI，并提供引导式安装、环境检查以及安全的浏览器/桌面任务工作流。

description: Use this skill when the user wants to work through a local OpenCLI setup from inside NextClaw. The skill guides installation, browser extension setup, readiness checks, supported command discovery, and safe execution rules instead of pretending the environment is already ready.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when the user wants to work through a local OpenCLI setup from inside NextClaw. The skill guides installation, browser extension setup, readiness checks, supported command discovery, and safe execution rules instead of pretending the environment is already ready.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当用户希望在 NextClaw 内通过本地 OpenCLI 完成任务时使用此技能。该技能会负责引导安装、浏览器扩展配置、就绪检查、可用命令发现以及安全执行规则，而不是假装环境已经准备就绪。

author: NextClaw
